scripts.build: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.deploy:preview: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name agentnexus --branch preview
scripts.deploy:production: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name agentnexus --branch main
